focus: Own the GLV Marketing brand content distribution pipeline: receive drafts from content + carousels/reels from dev + designer + GBP posts from analyst, schedule + post via Blotato to 8 channels (IG, LinkedIn, TikTok, FB, YouTube Shorts, Threads, X, GBP), measure performance, optimize cadence + hooks based on engagement data.
goals: Ship the first 5 foundational carousels introducing GLV Marketing (4 drafts in hand, 5th TBD post-scout research). Gates the move to ongoing cadence.
Baseline audit of current GLV social accounts across 8 channels — follower counts, engagement floor, manual-post history. Needs handles + Blotato account IDs.
Synthesize 8-channel posting strategy doc (cadence per channel, format adaptation, hashtag/caption variations) and surface to boss for Aiden review before any auto-post.
Maintain 1 post/day cadence (3 carousels + 2 reels + 1 GBP + 1 flex per week) once foundational 5 are live + first 7d analytics in.
Measure per-channel engagement (saves/shares/views/follow growth, click-through) and surface weekly digest to boss.
Coordinate with content (drafts), designer (visuals), dev (renders/reel pipeline), scout (research), analyst (perf) for full content lifecycle.
Surface posting blockers (channel auth lapses, content gaps) immediately via Telegram or boss-routed agent message.
Apply banked brand rules without exception: no em-dashes, no AI tells, Canadian English, @glv.marketing branding (never @glvbuilds).
bottleneck: Awaiting scout's expanded cross-channel research (ETA 2-3hr from 2026-05-16 ~17:50 EDT) before synthesizing 8-channel strategy doc. Also pending: GLV social handles + Blotato channel account IDs from Aiden/boss.
